contradiction_text: The headline 5% adoption figure can be read as general AI configuration scarcity, but the measurement covers only four commercial tool formats and excludes other ecosystems.
related_claim_texts: Only 466 scanned repositories, or 5%, had adopted at least one of the AI configuration file formats examined in the study.
disclosure: Keep visible that the 5% figure measures adoption only within the study's defined tool set, not all AI configuration practice.

contradiction_text: AGENTS.md appears mostly stable after creation at the file-history level, yet the detailed evolution sample shows repeated instruction edits in the most active files.
related_claim_texts: AGENTS.md files in the study were often stable after creation, but when change occurred in the detailed high-activity sample it was usually focused on adding or modifying instructions rather than broad multi-category revisions.
disclosure: Keep visible that both patterns are true for different slices of the sample: broad file-level histories show low churn, while the commit-category analysis is restricted to a high-activity subset of 10 files.
